title: Majukarya Mandiri sells 97 million Buana Lintas Lautan (BULL) shares
body: PT Majukarya Mandiri Indonesia released 97 million shares of PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), the oil and gas tanker company, on Tuesday, September 17. After selling its shares through PT Henan Putihrai Sekuritas and three other securities, this investor immediately decreased its ownership from 5.95% to 5.26%.

title: Master Print offers 435 million shares via IPO
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR), a company engaged in the trading and distribution of industrial packaging equipment, will release 435 million shares in an Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: 3 billion Gojek Tokopedia sold, net foreign volume closing at minus 441.11 million shares
body: On Thursday, September 18, foreign investors participated in selling significant amounts of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares, totaling 3.01 billion shares, for a net volume of -456.93 million shares. This figure accounted for approximately 57.80% of the entire foreign sales volume, which was 5.21 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was 4.77 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at -441.11 million shares.

title: Developing affordable internet services, WIFI partners with PLN subsidiary
body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI) announced its latest collaboration with PT Indonesia Connectivity Investasi (Iconvest), a subsidiary of PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (PLN) owned through PT Indonesia Comnets Plus (PLN Icon Plus).

title: Lippo Cikarang net profit falls 9.5% yoy in first half
body: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK), a real estate developer and manager owned by the Lippo Group, recorded a net profit of IDR 66 billion in the first semester (1H) of 2024.

title: Majukarya Mandiri sells 97 million Buana Lintas Lautan (BULL) shares
body: PT Majukarya Mandiri Indonesia released 97 million shares of PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), the oil and gas tanker company, on Tuesday, September 17. After selling its shares through PT Henan Putihrai Sekuritas and three other securities, this investor immediately decreased its ownership from 5.95% to 5.26%.

title: Master Print offers 435 million shares via IPO
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR), a company engaged in the trading and distribution of industrial packaging equipment, will release 435 million shares in an Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: 3 billion Gojek Tokopedia sold, net foreign volume closing at minus 441.11 million shares
body: On Thursday, September 18, foreign investors participated in selling significant amounts of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares, totaling 3.01 billion shares, for a net volume of -456.93 million shares. This figure accounted for approximately 57.80% of the entire foreign sales volume, which was 5.21 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was 4.77 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at -441.11 million shares.

title: Developing affordable internet services, WIFI partners with PLN subsidiary
body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI) announced its latest collaboration with PT Indonesia Connectivity Investasi (Iconvest), a subsidiary of PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (PLN) owned through PT Indonesia Comnets Plus (PLN Icon Plus).

title: Lippo Cikarang net profit falls 9.5% yoy in first half
body: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK), a real estate developer and manager owned by the Lippo Group, recorded a net profit of IDR 66 billion in the first semester (1H) of 2024.

title: TAPG scored dividend income of IDR 19.35 billion
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG), a company engaged in agricultural products, announced dividend income of IDR 19.35 billion from one of its subsidiaries.

title: PTDU secures contract of IDR 94.56 billion
body: PT Djasa Ubersakti Tbk (PTDU) has secured a new contract of IDR 94.56 billion for a Civil Servant Apparatus Flat project in Central Papua.

title: BREN to allocate USD 346 million for Star Energy Geothermal’s capacity raise
body: Star Energy Geothermal (SEG), a subsidiary of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN), will channel investment worth USD 346 million in order to boost energy capacity in several geothermal plants.

title: Sight Investment gains control of Siloam Hospital through purchase of 5.85 billion shares
body: On Friday, September 13, PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk (SILO) saw the purchase of over 5.85 billion shares by foreign investor Sight Investment Company Pte Limited, for a total of 7.20 billion shares recorded. Along with this purchase through PT BNI Sekuritas, the foreign investor's ownership increased dramatically from 10.4% to 55.4%. By default, Sight Investment took over as the operator of Siloam Hospital's controlling shareholder.

title: JCI slows down at closing bell
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) was at 7,829.14 at the closing bell on Wednesday (18/9). The Index's rate has been moving down since the opening bell at 09.00 WIB.

title: Transactions selling foreign shares surges, net foreign volume drops to -987.60 million shares
body: Foreign investors raised their stock selling activities on Tuesday, September 17, as shown by a foreign selling volume of approximately 5.45 billion shares. The sale of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) was one of the largest contributors to this increase, with foreign investors selling 3.55 billion GOTO shares for a net volume of -1.41 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was 4.46 billion shares, bringing net foreign volume down to -987.60 million shares.

title: Ready to compete with Chinese manufacturers, Astra launches 3 new battery-powered EVs
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) will compete with electric vehicle (EV) players from China, which have already been circulating in Indonesia.

title: KPC to work on downstream coal sector
body: PT Kaltim Prima Coal (KPC), a subsidiary of PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) is reportedly looking for partners to work on a coal downstream project.

title: Appointed at Munaslub Kadin, this is the list of companies managed by Anindya Bakrie
body: Anindya Novyan Bakrie was appointed as the General Chairman of the Indonesian Chamber of Commerce and Industry (Kadin) as a result of the Extraordinary Conference (Munaslub) last weekend (14/9).

title: No more coal business expansion, UNTR confident on branching out to mineral mining and NRE
body: PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR), an issuer engaged in the mining industry, reasserts its intention to no longer expand its coal mining business and instead direct its focus on diversification to mineral mining and investment in new and renewable energy (NRE).

title: Diversifying fund sources, BUMA to offer IDR 1 trillion bond
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), is offering Bond II Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 1 trillion.

title: UNTR to revise Komatsu sales, slightly up to 4500 units
body: Despite the normalisation of coal mining industry after sudden surge in commodity price in the past couple of years, PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) gains confidence and revises the projection of Komatsu sales to 4500 units.

title: Verona Indah Pictures to issue 1.12 billion shares in IPO
body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk (VERN) plans an initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 1.12 billion shares, equal to 23.54% of its issued and paid-up capital.

title: Capitalising on stock premium, BEEF to raise IDR 10.51 billion of capital
body: PT Estetika Tata Tiara Tbk (BEEF) will increase its capital by IDR 10.51 billion, which are generated from the capitalisation of the premium of its stock, following the previous bonus share distribution.

title: Astra Sedaya Finance to issue IDR 2.6 trillion bonds for working capital
body: PT Astra Sedaya Finance (ASDF), a financing company under Astra Group, is issuing Shelf-Registration Bond VI Phase IV Year 2024 with a principal worth IDR 2.6 trillion.

title: CUAN secures term loan of IDR 700 billion
body: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN) has obtained a term loan facility worth IDR 700 billion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: CARS adds IDR 15 billion worth of investment to automotive business line
body: PT Industri dan Perdagangan Bintraco Dharma Tbk (CARS) has increased capital investment in PT Sarana Bangun Raharja (SBR), a subsidiary engaged in the automotive sector.

title: Eyeing IDR 9 trillion, TOWR sets up rights issue
body: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) plans to conduct a capital raise with preemptive rights, also known as rights issue, to collect fresh funds of up to IDR 9 trillion.

title: Foreign selling volume hit 3 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at -45.60 million shares
body: On Friday, September 13, foreign investors' shares sale activities resulted in a foreign selling volume of up to 3 billion shares. Meanwhile, the foreign buying volume was at 2.95 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume was just slightly different, closing at -45.60 million shares. On the top buy list, the largest share purchase was made to the banking company PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), namely around 228.92 million shares, with a net volume of 153.14 million shares.

title: Harimas Tunggal Perkasa acquired 3.1 billion Impack Pratama (IMPC) shares
body: PT Harimas Tunggal Perkasa purchased up to 3.1 billion shares of PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk (IMPC) on Thursday, September 12. With the addition of shares through PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia, this investor's share control increased to 18.86% from its previous holdings of approximately 7.13 billion shares, or 13.15% of the stakes. Impack Pratama is a company that produces plastic roofing, ceiling, and wall panels, among other building materials.

title: Alibaba Group to promote GOTO’s digital innovation
body: Alibaba Group is providing Alibaba Cloud services to advance digital innovation of PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for the next five years.

title: BNI to conclude buyback of 40.51 million shares
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) had reportedly concluded a buyback of 40.51 million shares yesterday (15/9).

title: Incoming bids in SUN auction reach IDR 63.7 trillion
body: Total incoming bids recorded for Government Securities (SUN) in the auction today (17/9) reportedly reached IDR 63.7 trillion, as stated by DJPPR of the Ministry of Finance.

title: MTDL allocates IDR 120 billion for logistics centre expansion in Cibitung
body: PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL) has budgeted capital expenditure of IDR 120 billion for the expansion of logistics centre in Cibitung, Bekasi.

title: SMLE secures IDR 43 billion loan for capex
body: PT Sinergi Multi Lestarindo Tbk (SMLE) has secured a facility of IDR 43 billion in order to boost its capital expenditure (capex).

title: Unusual stock price surge, stock exchange authority suspends MLPT
body: The authority of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) has suspended the transaction of PT Multipolar Technology Tbk (MLPT) after showing an unusual rapid price surge.

title: August 2024 saw trade surplus dropped 6.96% yoy
body: Indonesia’s trade surplus in August 2024 of USD 2.89 billion dropped 6.96% year-on-year (yoy) from USD 3.11 billion seen in August 2023.

title: Morning session, JCI fluctuated at 7,820
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) fluctuated at over 7,820 since the opening bell today (17/9) until 11 AM WIB. Arriving at over 7,800, JCI broke its highest record, after lounging around 7,200-7,500 for a while.

title: WIFI to work with 50 local ISPs to reach 25 million internet users
body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI), through its subsidiary, PT Integrasi Jaringan Ekosistem (Weave), has signed a partnership agreement with 50 internet service providers (ISPs) to provide internet infrastructure for 25 million household internet users.

title: ANTM to work with 2 regional SOEs on Pongkeru Block
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) partners with two regional state-owned enterprises (SOEs) to establish joint ventures designed to work on nickel mining development in Pongkeru Block, East Luwu, South Sulawesi.
